title: Duplicate automation
excerpt:
I have several boards and workspaces with automations, columns and such. 
Is there a way to duplicate/copy these to new workspaces and boards?

posts.author: Pierce007 (Rune Haarberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have several boards and workspaces with automations, columns and such.
Is there a way to duplicate/copy these to new workspaces and boards?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Pierce007, you could use board templates or workspace templates to manage this. They are all part of the new Template Editor in monday.

Hope this helps!
Mark
